base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of level_9_first_quest_variant_alt_id — a tile (level_layout) from 1986 legend of zelda. Alternate/duplicate Level 9 sheet at different asset ID. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Alternate/duplicate Level 9 sheet at different asset ID; may be first/second quest variant or same-content duplicate
